Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The original description is too minimal and lacks critical context for AI agents. The improved version clarifies: (1) what is being deleted (webhook subscription), (2) the required parameter (webhook ID), (3) the effect of deletion (no more event notifications), (4) the response format (204 No Content), and (5) the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what consequences it has.

data.current_description: Deletes a webhook subscription.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a webhook subscription by ID
data.description_suggestion: Removes a webhook subscription from the system by its ID. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. The webhook subscription cannot be recovered after deletion.
data.reasoning: The original description is too minimal and lacks critical context for AI agents. The improved version clarifies: (1) what is being deleted (webhook subscription), (2) the required parameter (webhook ID), (3) the effect of deletion (no more event notifications), (4) the response format (204 No Content), and (5) the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what consequences it has.

Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what consequences it has.

data.current_description: Deletes a webhook subscription.

Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. The webhook subscription cannot be recovered after deletion.
